'''Hraki''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Vorzyd Cluster]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

==Description==
[[File:Hrakian.jpg|thumb|left|120px|A [[Hrakian]].]]

It was a trade hub and the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Near-Human]] [[Hrakian]]s. The [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] terrain consisted of soaring mountains and dense, steaming jungles.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-03-24 -->''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''
